title: ClusterInfo
description: BookKeeper cluster-wide status and bookie count information.

fields.name: auditorElected
fields.description: Whether an auditor has been elected.

fields.name: auditorId
fields.description: Socket address of the elected auditor.

fields.name: clusterUnderReplicated
fields.description: Whether any ledgers in the cluster are under-replicated.

fields.name: totalBookiesCount
fields.description: Total number of bookies in the cluster.

fields.name: writableBookiesCount
fields.description: Number of bookies available for writes.
